% cover_letter.tex -- cv-manager LaTeX cover letter template
% Rendered with Jinja2 using custom delimiters for LaTeX compatibility.
% Identity fields come from environment variables (.env).
% Cover letter body is generated by Claude from a job description.

\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{article}

\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[margin=1in]{geometry}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{parskip}

\definecolor{accent}{HTML}{2A6DB0}

\hypersetup{colorlinks=true, urlcolor=accent}

\pagestyle{empty}

\begin{document}

% --- Sender info ---
\begin{flushleft}
{\large\bfseries << full_name >>}\\[2pt]
<< location >>\\
<< email >>\\
<< phone >>
\end{flushleft}

\vspace{12pt}

% --- Date ---
<< letter_date | default("") >>

\vspace{12pt}

% --- Recipient ---
<% if recipient_name | default("") %>
<< recipient_name >>\\
<% endif %>
<% if recipient_company | default("") %>
<< recipient_company >>\\
<% endif %>
<% if recipient_address | default("") %>
<< recipient_address >>\\
<% endif %>

\vspace{12pt}

% --- Salutation ---
Dear << salutation | default("Hiring Manager") >>,

\vspace{8pt}

% --- Body ---
<< letter_body | default("") >>

\vspace{8pt}

% --- Closing ---
Sincerely,

\vspace{24pt}

<< full_name >>

\end{document}
